title: Monday Music Mix #29
summary: Finally! I’m making a habit out of this aren’t I? But the truth is, I’ve heard so much awful music of late that I haven’t been compelled to put out a mix. That, and trips back home and everything in between. I’m going to try and make this a fortnightly affair but my other pet project completes three years on the 19th, so there’s plenty on my plate and simply not enough clones.

legacy.descriptionHtml:
Twentyninth

Finally! I’m making a habit out of this aren’t I? But the truth is, I’ve heard so much awful music of late that I haven’t been compelled to put out a mix. That, and trips back home and everything in between. I’m going to try and make this a fortnightly affair but my other pet project completes three years on the 19th, so there’s plenty on my plate and simply not enough clones.

This one has a lot of standout tracks, so happy listening my fellow indie enthusiast.

Monday Music Mix: 29

Album art featuring work by Andrew Bannecker

Tracklist:

  1. Reptile Youth - Shooting Up Sunshine
  2. Jesca Hoop - Hospital (Win Your Love)
  3. Best Coast - The Only Place
  4. The Noisettes - That Girl
  5. Michael Kiwanuka - Bones
  6. Azure Ray - Scattered Like Leaves
  7. Eternal Summers - You Kill
  8. Deap Vally - Gonna Make My Own Money
  9. Passion Pit - Constant Conversations
  10. Kid Cudi - Dennis, Hook Me Up With Some More Of This Whiskey!
  11. Bat For Lashes - Laura
  12. Purity Ring - Fineshrine
  13. Ellie Goulding - Anything Could Happen
  14. Stars - Hold On When You Get Love and Let Go When You Give It
  15. Two Door Cinema Club - Sleep Alone
  16. d’Eon - Now You Do 
  17. Dum Dum Girls - Lord Knows
  18. Jens Lekman - I Know What Love Isn’t
  19. LP - Halo (Beyoncé cover)
  20. jj - High Summer
  21. Jinja Safari - Peter Pan

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album | Mirror
